## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New / updated module manifest
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes (Biome lint + format)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm validate-manifests` passes (if touching `packages/modules`)
- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Added or updated docs / ADRs when changing architecture
- [ ] Linked related issues

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: tradeoffs, follow-ups, screenshots, share URLs. -->
